items: Interview, Survey, Ethnographic research, Usability Testing, Diary Studies, Mixed method research, Workflow evaluation methods
Data analysis — Quantitative and Qualitative, Persona creation, Journey mapping, JTBD framework
UX/UI Design principles, Design thinking, Wireframe, Prototype building, High fidelity design
Research-specific LLM advanced prompting/prompt engineering, Building custom agents, Vibe coding, Vibe designing
Usertesting.com, Userzoom, dscout, Qualtrics, Google Analytics, Adobe suite, Figma, MS Office suite, GitHub Copilot, Claude Code
HTML/CSS, JavaScript, React, SQL/PL-SQL, MongoDB, MATLAB

experience.title: Senior Design Researcher
bullets: Leading foundational research that shapes Microsoft's agentic experiences — from defining opportunity areas for frontier/experimental agents to informing the design of agents already in market.
Leading user research across M365 AI Experiences across People, Connectors and Extensibility charters influencing strategy and product roadmap.

Championing AI adoption in the research community as an AI Champion and evangelist — driving experimentation, sharing learnings, and building reusable AI-powered solutions that advance research practice at scale.

Contributed two Claude Skills to the studio and org-wide toolkit, enabling PMs and designers to independently validate ideas, prototypes, and specs against existing research — surfacing where research supports, challenges, or extends a given direction without researcher involvement.

Architected an automated UX evaluation solution using Playwright and Espresso MCPs — given a user job-to-be-done, the system traverses predefined journeys and interactions to detect bugs, surface friction points, and score user job periodically.

Conducted critical AI + UX Research experiments: debunking synthetic users as a concept by demonstrating their limitations, and developed frameworks for effective AI integration in research methodologies.
Identifying and defining key competencies for Microsoft Copilot by partnering with researchers across interconnected product spaces to consolidate and amplify research insights.
Core team member for an India-wide research learning initiative, organizing sessions and contributing through workshops, technique presentations, and case studies.
Mentor researchers and designers in user research methodologies and AI powered research approaches.

experience.title: UX Researcher 2
bullets: Lead the research initiatives within the M365 core — People area.

Developed and executed a comprehensive research strategy encompassing formative and summative studies to inform the launch of the new People App in Teams, serving over 2 million daily active users in 2 weeks of launch.
Partnered with fellow researchers across the global M365 core, amplifying our collective expertise and insights in the domains of People to inform product development.
Fostered stakeholder culture where research insights drive decision-making, resulting in more user-centered product development.

experience.title: Senior UX Researcher
bullets: Crafted research-driven design strategies to understand and tackle the right user issues.
Collaborated with a UX team across geography to improve cross product workflows in MATLAB Coder and Simulink.
Planned and moderated user studies across geographies involving non-English speaking users.
Built research capability within the team by mentoring researchers on core methodologies and practice — raising the floor on research quality and independence.

experience.title: UX Specialist
bullets: Identified and captured user roles and goals by conducting contextual interviews with different stakeholders.

Collected customer requirements, product usage, and demographic data by designing surveys. Identified pain points in the current workflow through journey mapping, CARD methodology and secondary research.
Generated design ideas by facilitating design sprints and workshops with the development team.
Designed deliverables of different fidelity ranging from wireframe sketches to high-fidelity design at different stages of product development.
Validated GUI and API designs by building interactive prototypes and setting up usability studies.
Validated workflows by conducting studies using PURE methodology.

experience.title: UX Designer
bullets: Collaborated with product managers, engineers, and stakeholders to understand requirements and provide creative, thoughtful solutions.
Integrated user research into product designs and strategy.
Communicated complex concepts clearly across different audiences to influence product design strategy.
Conveyed the user experiences through wireframes, mockups, and high fidelity prototypes.

experience.title: UX Architect
bullets: Established the business goals and user goals by conducting user and stakeholder interviews.
Identified gaps and opportunities by analyzing business and user goals.
Built user empathy with stakeholders and mapped pain points using Journey mapping and Personas.
Built shared understanding of the existing challenges by facilitating core model workshop and card sorting exercises with clients.
Built information architecture that addresses both business and user goals with sitemaps, wireframes and content type and taxonomy creation using Drupal.
Improved user experience by collaborating with designers, product managers and developers.

experience.title: UX Research Intern
bullets: Gathered user insights by implementing in-house and remote usability studies and interviews.
Understood user pain points and key opportunity areas using user journey mapping.
Collaborated with designers and product managers to share insights and improve user experience.
Established the user experiences at each stage of the user journey by conducting benchmarking studies.
Researched and applied creative approaches to create shared understanding of the user problems.
Adapted collaborative approaches to design sprint process to make it more effective.
